commands.review_summary:
This draft PR rewrites the Parallels smoke skill to remove scanner-detected command and placeholder patterns, then adds a generated RuleSkill auto-fix note under docs.

Reproducibility: no. for the claimed security issue: the PR body provides scanner claims but no dangerous-command reproduction. Yes for the introduced defects: the branch diff directly shows the broken secret, Windows, Linux, docs, and whitespace changes.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed to reject or request a narrowly evidenced security fix; there is no safe automated repair because the branch premise and real-environment proof are missing.

target.title: [RuleSkill Certified] Automated security hardening patch
target.body:
## Automated Security Patch Proposal

This draft PR was generated automatically after targeted security analysis and RuleSkill pre-flight validation.

- Fixed issue: Dangerous command execution pattern.
- Detected risk profile: mild (score 1/5).
- RuleSkill guardrail compliance: 8/8 (must be 100% before PR creation).
- Your source was validated against 8 RuleSkill security guardrails.
- Source repository: openclaw/openclaw.

Mã nguồn của bạn đã được kiểm định qua 8 rào chắn bảo mật của RuleSkill. Lỗi đã được vá tự động và kỹ năng hiện đạt chuẩn an toàn 100%.

[![RuleSkill Certified](https://ruleskill.com/badges/certified.svg)](https://ruleskill.com/skills)

Please review, run CI, and merge when validated.
